\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
Implementation of the periodic homogeneous 3D Green\textquotesingle{}s function base. 

Provides only the constructor wiring, a basic Assign() helper used by near/far tests, and a setter for the number of evaluation terms. Concrete periodic kernels derive from this class and implement the actual summations and the Primitive\+Cell() mapping. 

Definition in file \mbox{\hyperlink{GreenFHom3DPer_8cpp_source}{Green\+FHom3\+DPer.\+cpp}}.
